title: Power to sell property
doc_html:
§5823.  Power to sell property

The constables may seize and sell movable and immovable property, rights and credits, in the same manner as sheriffs may do.

Redesignated from R.S. 33:1733 pursuant to Acts 2011, No. 248, §3.
doc_text:
§5823.  Power to sell property
